flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Arkansas at Monticello rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.0k → $20.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas at Monticello rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.0k → $9.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arkansas at Monticello fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Arkansas at Monticello rose 76% between 2021 and 2024 (15.9% → 28.0%).
